titleStmt.title: SII 24.123: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 123. (A.R. No. 56 of 1936-37.) IV PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Commences with the introduction Pūmaṉṉupadumam. Purports to be an order issued by the deity leasing the temple lands to the kōvaṇavar who were to plant cocoanut and areca palms thereon and to pay a specified portion of the yield to the temple year after year. The inscription is dated Kuṁbha, ba. 5, Saturday, Svātī, in the 7th year of the king's reign and the details work out regularly to A.D. 1140, February 10, Saturday; ·14; ·35.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmantu patuvam pūtta Eḻulakun tāmuṉ ceytavattāl paruti vaḻit tonṟiya neṭumālivaneṉac cuṭarmuṭi cūṭi Irunilamakaḷai Urimaiyil puṇarntu tirumakaḷ paṇaimulaic ceñcāntaṇaintu parumaṇimārvam paruvarai nikaṟpac jayamakaḷ ceḻuñcantaṉac cuvaṭṭāl puyamirukayilaip poruppeṉat toṉṟa nāmakaḷ tānum meṅkomakan cevvāy pavalac ceyyoḷi paṭaittaṉa niyānenat
tavaḷananneṟit tanittoṭaiyiteṉap pukaḻmakaḷ cintai makiḻnāḷinum Orukuṭai nilavum porupaṭaittikiri veyilenak karuṅkali Iruḷiṉait turappa niṭupallūḻi Eḻkaṭaṟ puṟattiṉuṅ koṭāc centanikko linitulāva minamuñcilaiyum citaintu vāṉuyar poṉṉeṭu meruviṟ puli viṟṟiruppa Umpariyāṉai Ōrroṭṭiṉukkum tampameṉṉa tanittani ticaitoṟum jayastampam niṟ(p)pa paci pakaiyāṉatu tituniṅki mannuyir
taḻaippa manuvāṟu viḷaṅka mātavar tavamum maṅkaiyar kaṟpum Ātiyantaṇar Ākutikkaṉalum miyteḻu koṇṭal vicu taṇ puṉalum nitiyil varum cāti Oḻukkamum nitiyaṟamum piṟaḻātu nikaḻp pāvum paḻaṉapparappum paṇaikkaimāvu mallatu vanṟaṉaip paṭutal kaṉaviluṅ kāṇṭaṟkariteṉa varunetip puṭaiyilum palveṟu puḷḷiṉa mallatu ciṟaiyeṉap paṭutaliṉṟi niṟai peruñ celvamoṭa
vani vāḻp pallavar teluṅkar māḷuvar kaliṅkar koṅkalar kanṉaṭar kaṭārar tenṉar ceralar cetiyar tirikarttar vaṅka raṅkar vattirar mattira kaṅkar coṉakar kaiykaiyar jinakar Enṟa Aṟaikaḻal ventarum Allā Araicarum muṟaimaiyil vantiṟai kuṇarntiṟaiñca tirumalaṟ celvi cempiyan kiḻānaṭi Orumaruṅ kuṭanamarntiruppa Aruḷ
poruḷ cimaiyap poṟ koṭṭimaiyappāvaiyum civanum pola vira siṅhāsaṉattu puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirācakecaripanmarāna tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻa tevaṟku yāṇṭu Ēḻāvatu—kumpanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu pañcamiyum caṉikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa cotināḷ tiruvaraṅkat tiruppatiyil śrīvai
yiṣṇavakaḷom tirukkuṟai kamukum teṅkum vaiyttu tiruccolaiyākka veṇumeṉ ṟum Itu Ākku miṭattu kamuku vaittāl Ikkamuku śrīpaṇṭārattukku Uṭalāka kaṭava pākku Oruva niccayittu vaiykka veṇumenṟu pāttu Ippaṭi Aḻakiyamaṇa vāḷap perumāḷukku viṇṇappañceyya Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷapperumāḷ varicai tiruvāy
moḻintaruḷinapaṭikku pirasādañ ceytaruḷina tirumukappaṭi 2 Etat trailokya nirmmāṇatrāṇa saṅhāra kāraṇam . śrīmat śrīraṅganāthasya śāsanam śāśvatam param . nam viṭṭu kuṭavaruṅ kovaṇavarkaḷukkum nam kanmikaḷukkum nam variyilārkkum nam pu ṅkaḷil kamukun teṅkum vaikkalān taṟai Atto kil naṅ koṇavarkaḷe ka
mukum vaikkak kaṭavarkaḷākavum kamukunteṅkum Ākkik kaṭamai koḷḷumiṭattu Akavāṟṟil pākku koḷa pukka vāṇṭu talaiyāl nūṟu pākkāka vanta pākku Iraṇṭāmāṇṭu talaiyāl Irunūṟu pākkāka vanta pākkum muvvāmāṇṭu talaiyāl munnūṟu pākkāka vanta pākkum nālāmāṇṭu mutal talaiyāl nāṉūṟu pākkāka vanta pākkum kollai
ttaṟaiyil kamukku toppukku vāṇṭu talaiyāl Eṇpatu pākku Iraṇṭāmāṇṭu talaiyāl nūṟṟirupatu pākkāka vanta pākkum muvāmāṇṭu talaiyāl Irunūṟṟu nāṟpatu pākkāka vanta pākkum nālāmāṇṭu mutal talaiyāl munnūṟu pākkāka vanta pākku Eṇṇakkaṭavatākavum . Ippaṭi Akavāṟṟup paṟṟukku talaiyāl nānūṟu kollait taṟaiyil niṉṟa kamuku
kku talaiyāl munnūṟu pākkāka vanta pākku Eṇṇumiṭattu Avar tuccam Āyirattiṉ vāy patinañcu pākkāka Eṟṟi pākkāle nam paṇṭārattile Eṇṇak kaṭavarkaḷākavum . teṅku talai nirampik kāccāl teṅkukku kācu Oru māvākavum māvāl Orumāk kācākavum vanta kāce koḷḷak kaṭavatākavum connom . Ippaṭikku nam Āṇai Iṭṭuk kallilum cempilum veṭṭi kamukun teṅkum vaikka
lān taṟai Ellām vaittākkip paṇṇuka . tiruvāy moḻintaruḷa Ivai tiruvaraṅkappiriyan Eḻuttu . Ivai māṅkuṭit talaimakaṉukku mokkum . Ippaṭikku mel koḷvār Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷapperumāḷ śrī ṇai tribhuveṉamuḻutuṭaiyārāṇai . Itu śrī karaṇattār rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 24.123 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
